coachAM: Your pursuit of being "the best worker, the best seller, charismatic with disciplina and efficiency" is collapsing under the weight of unaddressed physical and mental fatigue, evident in the 50% completion across Sleep, Training, and Sovereign Morning protocols, directly impacting your ability to convert interview opportunities and combat "laziness." The root cause is a fundamental disconnect between your high-octane aspirations and the foundational disciplines that fuel elite performance, thereby eroding your capacity for sustained focus and consistent execution required to build at this level. Today, before anything else, block out 9:30 PM for lights out and set your alarm for 4:30 AM, then confirm both in your calendar.
